title: Create : Core
description: A set of mods that improve and enhance its experience
body:
# ![Create Core](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/060171c67bf99a17124bdcb739b723cf43db06e8_0.webp) 
Create: Core is a lightweight modpack focused on the Create mod and its add-ons. It aims to provide a smooth and optimized version of the Create experience. This modpack provides performance optimization to make the Create experience more fun and accessible.

The project's purpose is to improve the Create experience by adding several add-ons, including Create Crafts & Additions, Create Jetpack, Create Diesel Generators, and Create Enchantment Industry. Along with optimization mods like Sodium, Lithium, and FerriteCore for improved performance.

Minimum memory allocation: 6-8 GB of RAM
